title: Xu Family
content:
Xu Family
 is famous for being extremely cruel and vindictive. Whenever one of their family member is murdered they slaughter the culprit along with his family and every person on the planet he inhabited.

They inhabit 
Planet Dong Lin
 alongside the illustrious 
Xiang Family
, one of the two remaining six ancient cultivation families, yet their reputation surpasses that of the Xiang Family.
